---
title: "probe_to_gene_mapping"
author: "Melanie Smith"
date: "2026-04-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Clean-up environment

```{r}
rm(list = ls(all.names = TRUE)) # will clear all objects includuing hidden objects
gc() # free up memory and report the memory usage
options(max.print = .Machine$integer.max,
        scipen = 999,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
        dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE) # Print everything without truncation, avoid scientific notation, keep strings as characters, silence dplyr’s “grouped output” informational me>
set.seed(42) # set seed for reproducibility
```

# Set project directories and file paths

```{r}
project_name <- "20260421_natashaHarvey_gata2_mouse"
base_repo_dir <- "/home/melanie-smith/workDir/natashaHarvey"

project_repo_dir <- file.path(base_repo_dir, project_name)

raw_data <- file.path(project_repo_dir, "data", "raw")
processed_data <- file.path(project_repo_dir, "data", "processed")
out_dir <- file.path(project_repo_dir, "outDir")

```

# Load Libraries

```{r}
# if (!requireNamespace("mogene10sttranscriptcluster.db", quietly = TRUE)) {
#   BiocManager::install("mogene10sttranscriptcluster.db", ask = FALSE)
#   }
library(mogene10sttranscriptcluster.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
```

# Load expression data

```{r}
expr_matrix <- readRDS(file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma.rds"))

cat("Loaded expression matrix with", nrow(expr_matrix), "features\n")
```

# Extract probe IDs

```{r}
probe_ids <- rownames(expr_matrix)
```

# Map to gene annotations

```{r}
# fetch the annotations so we can map the probe IDs to the gene symbols
annotations <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  mogene10sttranscriptcluster.db,
  keys = probe_ids,
  columns = c("SYMBOL", "GENENAME", "ENSEMBL"),
  keytype = "PROBEID"
  )

# Inspect mapping
# we know the ~20-60% of probes won't have any gene information to map to so let's take a look and see what we have
# give me 10 rows where the ENSEMBL annotation is not NA
annotations[!is.na(annotations$ENSEMBL), ][1:10, ]

# What percentage of probes actually mapped to Ensembl IDs
mean(is.na(annotations$ENSEMBL))
# [1] 0.2758796

# create an annotations file with only mapped probe IDs
annotations_clean <- annotations[!is.na(annotations$SYMBOL), ]
```

# Merge with expression matrix

```{r}
annotations_unique <- annotations_clean[!duplicated(annotations_clean$PROBEID), ]

expr_annotated <- merge(
  annotations_unique,
  expr_matrix,
  by.x = "PROBEID",
  by.y = "row.names",
  all.y = TRUE
  )

# let's take a look at the expression matrix with gene symbls
expr_annotated[!is.na(expr_annotated$SYMBOL), ][1:20, ]
expr_annotated[!is.na(expr_annotated$ENSEMBL), ][1:20, ]
```

# Save probe-level annotated matrix

```{r}
# Save the full probe-level annotated matrix before collapsing
# This preserves the ability to return to probe-level data if needed downstream
write.csv(
  expr_annotated,
  file = file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma_annotated.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
  )

saveRDS(expr_annotated,
        file = file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma_annotated.rds"))

cat("Probe-level annotated matrix saved:", nrow(expr_annotated), "probes\n")
```

# Collapse probes to gene level (highest mean expression per gene)

```{r}
# Identify expression columns (all columns that are not annotation fields)
annot_cols <- c("PROBEID", "SYMBOL", "GENENAME", "ENSEMBL")
expr_cols   <- setdiff(colnames(expr_annotated), annot_cols)

# Compute mean expression across all samples for each probe
expr_annotated$mean_expr <- rowMeans(expr_annotated[, expr_cols], na.rm = TRUE)

# For each gene symbol, retain only the probe with the highest mean expression
# Order by descending mean expression so the first occurrence per SYMBOL is the best probe
expr_annotated_ordered <- expr_annotated[order(expr_annotated$SYMBOL,
                                               -expr_annotated$mean_expr), ]

expr_gene_level <- expr_annotated_ordered[!duplicated(expr_annotated_ordered$SYMBOL), ]

# Drop the helper column now that collapsing is done
expr_gene_level$mean_expr <- NULL

cat("Probes before collapsing: ", nrow(expr_annotated), "\n")
cat("Genes after collapsing:   ", nrow(expr_gene_level), "\n")
```

# Inspect gene-level matrix

```{r}
# Confirm structure looks correct
cat("Gene-level matrix dimensions:", nrow(expr_gene_level), "genes x",
    ncol(expr_gene_level), "columns\n")

# Preview first few rows
head(expr_gene_level[, c("PROBEID", "SYMBOL", "GENENAME", expr_cols[1:4])])
```

# Save gene-level matrix

```{r}
write.csv(
  expr_gene_level,
  file = file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma_gene_level.csv"),
  row.names = FALSE,
  quote = FALSE
  )

saveRDS(expr_gene_level,
        file = file.path(processed_data, "expression_matrix_rma_gene_level.rds"))

cat("Gene-level matrix saved:", nrow(expr_gene_level), "genes\n")
cat("Annotation complete.\n")
```

# Session info for reproducibility

```{r}
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()),
           file.path(out_dir, "sessionInfo_annotation.txt"))
```
